calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-12-2011 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-16-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee,
CSR: B. Fields, CSR #7235

PLAINTIFF JEFFRY M. SCHMITZ APPEARING IN PRO PER AND placed under oath and direct examined.

Default has been entered against the Defendant(s).

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff(s), and against the Defaulted Defendant(s) JEFFREY O. ORRISCH for Judgment as follows:

Damages/Principal - $30,000.00
Prejudgment Interest - $10,250.00
Total judgment in the amount of $40,250.00

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
